description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline using the debian:testing Docker image with two stages: build and test. In the build stage add a build job that runs before_script apt update and apt install -y --no-install-recommends build-essential g++ pkg-config libboost-all-dev meson librtlsdr-dev libgpiod-dev, then script meson build and cd build && ninja, and publishes the path build/subprojects/librts/test/tests as an artifact. In the test stage add a test job that sets GIT_STRATEGY to none, runs before_script apt update and apt install -y --no-install-recommends librtlsdr0 libgpiod2 libboost-test-dev, then script cd build/subprojects/librts/test && ./tests. No caches, services, or special rules are defined.
